lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aretha said you might be able to repair the soul bearer for me.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: The soul bearer! You have the soul bearer! The voices speak of it often. It is from this place, yet it is not of this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you repair it?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: The voices tell me I can. They speak to me!

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: The voices say you must use it wisely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I will.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Who goes there? This is no place for a human. You need to leave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're starting to scare me man...

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: I am no man! They changed me and cursed me to remain here...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean they changed you?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: I was once a free man, powerful and wealthy. I owned several apothecaries across Kourend and sold the tastiest potions in the land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: One of my greatest inventions, it was going so well. I spent days finding the right herbs, I travelled across all of Kourend to find the most exotic weeds. Once I had gathered them all, I put them in a potion and mixed in

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: the final ingredient.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kourend? Interesting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kourend? Oh yeah, I've been there.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Yes, yes... The potion tasted delicious but it was missing a tiny something so I added Magic roots to the potion. It started to pulsate and glow! I took a sip and I felt like a million gold! A few seconds later my eye sight

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: began to blur, my brain was throbbing. I fell and hit my head on my worktop, then it all went black.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch! But, you still haven't said who changed you?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Will you let me finish?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: I woke up screaming in pain. Blue foam streaming out of my mouth, my eye sight worse than before, the only things I could make out were 3 tall figures with green banners - they were of the Arceuus Elders. They

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: muttered to each other in Archaic Language after trying to get up several times. I lost hope and stared at the sky. I had given up when the tallest of the figures bent over and brought his face right to mine and spoke

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: very softly 'We can save you, but it will come at a cost'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So they saved you?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Yes of course they saved me but look at the cost! I have horns coming out of my head and I'm still blind and stuck here... forever alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was the curse?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: I have been charged to stay here to prevent the Monstrosity from escaping. Those gates and the winches that operate them are the only thing that stops it breaking free.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What monstrosity? What's behind those gates?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: You really do not want to know. Leave this place human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey now, I'm no wimp. What's to stop me from just turning the winch to open the gate and going in?

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Me. And of course your quick demise at the mercy of Cerberus, guardian of the river of souls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I can do it!

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: You are obviously passionate at trying. But only those with great skill at slaying these types of beast may enter.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: THE VOICES! AAAHHHHH! Leave this place human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have been charged by the slayer masters to eliminate this type of threat.

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: Then you may pass... may your soul not end up consumed and forever condemned to the-

lines.speaker: Key Master
lines.text: THE VOICES! AAAHHHHH! Leave this place human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.
